name: Health Care Family
description_short: Unity Financial Credit Union (formerly Healthcare Financial) is a Connecticut-based credit union serving New Haven, Fairfield, and Middlesex counties, plus healthcare workers nationwide, with auto loans, credit cards, and savings products.
description_long:
Unity Financial Credit Union has operated since 1950, originally serving healthcare professionals and their families in Connecticut. The organization recently rebranded from Healthcare Financial to Unity Financial, signaling an expansion of its membership base while maintaining its healthcare worker focus. The credit union is federally insured through the NCUA and operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution.

Unity Financial offers a comprehensive range of consumer financial products including auto loans (as low as 4.75% APR), VISA credit cards (from 14.00% APR), savings accounts, money market accounts, share certificates, and mortgage services. Members can access these products through online and mobile banking platforms, with an emphasis on digital convenience. The institution also features specialized programs like the Save to Win® sweepstakes savings account, which allows members to win up to $5,000 while saving. Auto lending is a primary focus, with the website featuring extensive vehicle search tools across multiple vehicle types.

Unity Financial distinguishes itself through its credit union structure, which typically offers lower fees and competitive rates compared to traditional banks. The organization emphasizes community membership—accepting those who live, work, worship, or attend school in its service area, plus healthcare workers anywhere. Members receive exclusive discounts through Love My Credit Union rewards, and the institution promotes a "Bank Smarter, Together" philosophy highlighting member benefits and personal service.

The main limitations are geographic and membership-based: service is primarily restricted to three Connecticut counties unless you work in healthcare. The website lacks detailed rate comparisons, comprehensive fee schedules, or transparent lending criteria. While the organization presents itself as offering competitive rates, specific APR offers appear promotional and actual rates depend on individual qualification. The recent platform migration to new online and mobile banking systems may create temporary user experience challenges during the transition period.
services: Auto loans (new and used vehicles, boats, motorcycles, RVs, powersports)
Save to Win® prize-linked savings program
Love My Credit Union member rewards program
pros: Auto loan rates start at 4.75% APR, competitive for credit union members
Save to Win® program offers up to $5,000 in monthly and annual prizes while building savings
Love My Credit Union rewards provides exclusive discounts on subscriptions, financial planning, and entertainment
NCUA-insured member deposits provide federal protection up to $250,000
Membership eligibility includes all healthcare workers nationwide, not just Connecticut residents
Established 1950—74+ years of operational history and member relationships
Comprehensive auto lending with vehicle search tools covering autos, boats, motorcycles, RVs, and powersports
cons: Geographic restriction to New Haven, Fairfield, and Middlesex counties for most members (unless healthcare employed)
Website lacks detailed fee schedules, account minimums, and specific APR ranges for different credit profiles
Recent platform migration required mandatory re-enrollment for online/mobile banking, creating friction for existing members
Limited mortgage information provided on website despite offering mortgage services
Share certificate rates (1.00% APY for 18 months) and money market rates (0.65% APY) are below current market rates for many competitors
best_for: Connecticut residents (New Haven, Fairfield, Middlesex counties) seeking auto financing and community banking
Healthcare workers anywhere needing competitive loan rates and membership benefits
Savers interested in prize-linked savings accounts who want to build emergency funds while gaming for prizes
Auto buyers and vehicle owners seeking competitive rates with credit union member benefits
diagnosis: Unity Financial Credit Union is best for Connecticut residents in its service area or healthcare workers nationally seeking competitive auto loans and credit union membership benefits. The primary caveat is that non-healthcare members outside Connecticut cannot join, and the recent platform migration may require patience as the institution completes its online banking transition.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Health Care Family (Saint Louis, MO) | CreditDoc
meta_description: Health Care Family — NCUA-insured credit union in Saint Louis, MO. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
